text: DrJill: Hello, I'm Dr.
DrJill: Jill.
DrJill: Welcome to Let's Learn English with Anna.
DrJill: A week has seven days.
DrJill: Do you know what day today is?
DrJill: In English?
DrJill: A calendar helps us know the day.
DrJill: So does Anna.
DrJill: Let's go to her treehouse.
Anna: Oh hi, I am Anna
Anna: Today is Thursday.
Anna: It is my superhero day.
Anna: Max, please play my favorite superhero movie.
Max: Today is Wednesday.
Max: Wednesday is your music day.
Anna: You are right.
Anna: I am wrong.
Max: I am a computer.
Max: I am never wrong.
Anna: Well, I am human.
Anna: And humans are often wrong.
Anna: Sometimes we don't know the the day of the week.
Anna: We ask others, what day is it?
DrJill: We often do different things on different days
DrJill: So it is important to know the right day.
DrJill: Here are some friends.
DrJill: They talk about the days of the week.
Students: Today is Sunday.
Students: On Sundays, I like to draw.
Students: On Saturdays, I like to play soccer or baseball.
Students: Today is Monday.
Students: I go to school on Monday.
DrJill: Thanks guys!
DrJill: Those are some of the days.
DrJill: Now Anna will help us with all the days of the week.
DrJill: It is her music day, so I hope she has a song.
DrJill: Songs are great ways to remember language.
DrJill: Here's Anna.
Anna: Now let's talk about the letter W.
Anna: The sound it makes is w
Anna: W begins week.
Anna: W begins Wednesday.
Anna: Let's hear all the sounds in the word week.
Anna: Okay, say the days of the week with me.
Anna: Ready?
Anna: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.
Anna: This song teaches the days of the week.
Anna: Days of the week.
Anna: Monday and Tuesday.
Anna: Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday, Days of the Week.
DrJill: A Days of the Week song
DrJill: Now let's hear our friends again.
DrJill: One of them plays soccer or baseball on Saturdays.
DrJill: Do you remember who?
DrJill: Let's listen again.
Students: Today is Sunday.
Students: On Sundays, I like to draw.
Students: On Saturdays, I like to play soccer or baseball
Students: Today is Monday.
Students: I go to school on Monday.
DrJill: That's right, Thomas is the one.
DrJill: He plays soccer or baseball on Saturdays.
DrJill: Now, let's go back to Anna.
DrJill: She loves superheroes.
DrJill: So she visits some.
DrJill: I want to see that.
DrJill: I love superheroes.
Anna: Superhero
Anna: And four.
Anna: I love the silver server.
Anna: This is
Anna: Awesome.
Anna: The show opens on Monday.
Anna: But no one is here.
Anna: Oh no, today is Sunday.
DrJill: For Anna's birthday, I can get her a calendar.
DrJill: She really needs one.
DrJill: Now you can talk about the days of the week
DrJill: Ask your friends and family, what day is it?
DrJill: And come back to Let's Learn English with Anna.
